case_title: MARIA ELENA MARTINEZ VS. GUSTAVO ADOLFO TORRES-BOTEO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, MARIA ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES-BOTEO, GUSTAVO ADOLFO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS FILED BY DEFENDANT TORRES-BOTEO, GUSTAVO ADOLFO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2022 - CONTINUED FOR STATUS ON BANKRUPTCY STAY TO JUN-01-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIA ELENA MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUSTAVO ADOLFO TORRES-BOTEO IS NOT PRESENT. CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO ADD HER NAME TO THE DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY LIST OF CREDITORS. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
(SC-105)REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, MARIA ELENA
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE DONE ON 2/9/22 (SERVICE FEE $75) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, MARIA ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES-BOTEO, GUSTAVO ADOLFO
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER BY PLANTIFF **DENIED** -DEFENDANT TORRES-BOTEO HAS A PENDING BANKRUPTCY CASE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$20.00) SERVED FEB-01-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES-BOTEO, GUSTAVO ADOLFO
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR STATUS ON BANKRUPTCY STAY.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-13-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIA ELENA MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUSTAVO ADOLFO TORRES-BOTEO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
